latin: Venator lacertam alteram per frutices secutus est. sed non vidit alteram a latere advenientem. cum intellexisset se circumventum esse, solum dixit: 'callida puella.'

questions.target: One of the lizards through the bushes
choices: One of the lizards through the bushes

questions.prompt: What did the hunter realize too late?
questions.target: He had been outflanked by another lizard
choices: He had been outflanked by another lizard
He was in the wrong area

translation: The hunter followed one lizard through the bushes. But he did not see another approaching from the side. When he realized he had been surrounded, he only said: 'Clever girl.'
